acceptance_targets: [ch12_dialogue_001] Pass if the revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:231, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:237, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:249 still ends the friendship but grounds at least three of Martha's accusatory turns in immediate scene specifics (for example her knee, hand, broth, table, corridor, or sleeve), includes at least one interruption or self-correction from her under pain pressure, and contains no standalone aphoristic line that functions as the scene's moral thesis by itself. Fail if the confrontation still reads as a sequence of balanced mini-speeches.

[ch12_prose_001] Pass if the revised narration in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:21, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:95, and the narration attached to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:257 contains no subjectless or verb-less emphasis beats of the form "Not X." or "Better controlled.", while preserving the same scene information and pressure. Fail if any of those cited passages still rely on clipped fragments for rhythm.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:209, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:231, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:237, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:249 still ends the friendship but grounds at least three of Martha's accusatory turns in immediate scene specifics (for example her knee, hand, broth, table, corridor, or sleeve), includes at least one interruption or self-correction from her under pain pressure, and contains no standalone aphoristic line that functions as the scene's moral thesis by itself. Fail if the confrontation still reads as a sequence of balanced mini-speeches.
findings.problem: Martha's central confrontation repeatedly resolves into balanced, quotable moral verdicts instead of the messier pressure-speech the style bible calls for. In the chapter's dominant conversation, her voice slides from blunt, bodily Hufflepuff directness into composed thesis-lines, which makes the exchange sound authored rather than overheard.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Martha's major accusatory turns at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:195, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:199, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:231, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:237, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:249 so her anger stays sharp but arrives through injured-body, kitchen, and task language, plus interruption or pain-driven roughness. Keep the breakup and her clarity, but replace the clean moral maxims with lines that sound like Martha speaking while hurt, tired, and still handling broth, bread, and her bad knee and hand.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised narration in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:21, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:95, and the narration attached to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:257 contains no subjectless or verb-less emphasis beats of the form "Not X." or "Better controlled.", while preserving the same scene information and pressure. Fail if any of those cited passages still rely on clipped fragments for rhythm.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly falls into clipped fragment beats such as "Not an escape charm. Not rescue.", "Not heat this time.", and "Better controlled. Lower down." That is both a visible sentence tic by recurrence and a direct violation of the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the fragment-heavy narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:21, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:93, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:95, and the narration attached to snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:257 into grammatically complete sentences that preserve pace through syntax rather than omission. Keep the close-third compression, but let the rhythm come from complete clauses, punctuation, and image sequence instead of repeated subjectless "Not X" or adjective-only fragments.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
